title: About Us
description: Learn more about Trend-AI, your daily destination for high-signal insights into Artificial Intelligence.
content:
# About Trend-AI

Welcome to **Trend-AI**, where we bridge the gap between complex technological breakthroughs and the people who use them. Our mission is to provide **Intelligence Optimized**—distilling the vast noise of the digital age into high-signal, actionable insights perfectly tailored for technologists, entrepreneurs, and the curious.

## Our Mission
In a world moving at the speed of light, we believe clarity is the ultimate competitive advantage. Trend-AI is dedicated to exploring the frontiers of:
- **Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning**
- **Robotics & Automation**
- **The Future of the Digital Economy**
- **Agentic Architectures**

## Why Trend-AI?
Unlike generic news aggregators, our editorial team focuses on the "So What?" We analyze how today's announcements will shape tomorrow's industries. Every piece of content is curated to ensure technical accuracy without sacrificing accessibility.

## Our Team
Trend-AI is powered by a global collective of researchers, software engineers, and futurists who are deeply embedded in the tech ecosystem. We are not just reporting on the future; we are build it.

Thank you for being part of our journey. Stay ahead of the curve.

title: Contact Us
description: Get in touch with the Trend-AI editorial team for inquiries, feedback, or collaborations.
content:
# Contact Trend-AI

We value our community’s feedback and are always open to new insights. Whether you have a question about our content, a press inquiry, or a potential collaboration, we’d love to hear from you.

## Get in Touch

**General Inquiries & Feedback**  
For general questions or feedback regarding our articles:  
[trendyaidev@gmail.com](mailto:trendyaidev@gmail.com)

**Editorial & Press**  
For press releases or editorial pitches:  
[trendyaidev@gmail.com](mailto:trendyaidev@gmail.com)

**Technical Support**  
If you are experiencing issues with the website:  
[trendyaidev@gmail.com](mailto:trendyaidev@gmail.com)

## Social Media
Stay connected with us for real-time updates and community discussions:
- **X (formerly Twitter)**: [@TrendAI](https://x.com/TrendAI)
- **LinkedIn**: [Trend-AI Intelligence](https://linkedin.com/company/trend-ai)

## Response Time
We strive to respond to all inquiries within **24-48 business hours**. Thank you for your patience and for being a valued member of the Trend-AI community.

title: Disclaimer
description: Review the Disclaimer for Trend-AI regarding technical accuracy and information use.
content:
# Disclaimer

**Last Updated: April 20, 2026**

The information provided by **Trend-AI** on [https://trend-ai.dev](https://trend-ai.dev) is for general informational purposes only. All information on the Site is provided in good faith, however we make no representation or warranty of any kind, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, adequacy, validity, reliability, availability, or completeness of any information on the Site.

## 1. Professional Disclaimer
The Site cannot and does not contain technical, financial, or legal advice. The technological and Artificial Intelligence information is provided for general informational and educational purposes only and is not a substitute for professional advice. Accordingly, before taking any actions based upon such information, we encourage you to consult with the appropriate professionals. THE USE OR RELIANCE OF ANY INFORMATION CONTAINED ON THIS SITE IS SOLELY AT YOUR OWN RISK.

## 2. External Links Disclaimer
The Site may contain (or you may be sent through the Site) links to other websites or content belonging to or originating from third parties or links to websites and features in banners or other advertising. Such external links are not investigated, monitored, or checked for accuracy, adequacy, validity, reliability, availability, or completeness by us.

## 3. Errors and Omissions Disclaimer
While we have made every attempt to ensure that the information contained in this site has been obtained from reliable sources, Trend-AI is not responsible for any errors or omissions, or for the results obtained from the use of this information.

## 4. Views Expressed Disclaimer
The Site may contain views and opinions which are those of the authors and do not necessarily reflect the official policy or position of any other author, agency, organization, employer, or company, including Trend-AI.

## 5. Contact Us
If you require any more information or have any questions about our site's disclaimer, please feel free to contact us by email at [trendyaidev@gmail.com](mailto:trendyaidev@gmail.com).

title: Privacy Policy
description: Understand how Trend-AI collects, uses, and protects your information.
content:
# Privacy Policy

**Last Updated: April 20, 2026**

At **Trend-AI**, accessible from [https://trend-ai.dev](https://trend-ai.dev), one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by Trend-AI and how we use it.

## 1. Information We Collect
We collect several types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our service to you:
- **Personal Data**: While using our service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information, such as your email address (for newsletter subscriptions).
- **Log Files**: Trend-AI follows a standard procedure of using log files. These files log visitors when they visit websites. The information collected by log files include internet protocol (IP) addresses, browser type, Internet Service Provider (ISP), date and time stamp, referring/exit pages, and possibly the number of clicks.

## 2. Cookies and Web Beacons
Like any other website, Trend-AI uses 'cookies'. These cookies are used to store information including visitors' preferences, and the pages on the website that the visitor accessed or visited. The information is used to optimize the users' experience by customizing our web page content based on visitors' browser type and/or other information.

## 3. Google DoubleClick DART Cookie
Google is one of a third-party vendor on our site. It also uses cookies, known as DART cookies, to serve ads to our site visitors based upon their visit to our site and other sites on the internet. However, visitors may choose to decline the use of DART cookies by visiting the Google ad and content network Privacy Policy at the following URL – [https://policies.google.com/technologies/ads](https://policies.google.com/technologies/ads)

## 4. Our Advertising Partners
Some of advertisers on our site may use cookies and web beacons. Our advertising partners include:
- **Google AdSense**

Each of our advertising partners has their own Privacy Policy for their policies on user data.

## 5. Security of Data
The security of your data is important to us, but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your Personal Data, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

## 6. Consent
By using our website, you hereby consent to our Privacy Policy and agree to its Terms and Conditions.

title: Terms and Conditions
description: Review the Terms and Conditions for using the Trend-AI website and services.
content:
# Terms and Conditions

**Welcome to Trend-AI!**

These terms and conditions outline the rules and regulations for the use of **Trend-AI's** Website, located at [https://trend-ai.dev](https://trend-ai.dev). By accessing this website, we assume you accept these terms and conditions. Do not continue to use Trend-AI if you do not agree to take all of the terms and conditions stated on this page.

## 1. Intellectual Property Rights
Unless otherwise stated, Trend-AI and/or its licensors own the intellectual property rights for all material on Trend-AI. All intellectual property rights are reserved. You may access this from Trend-AI for your own personal use subjected to restrictions set in these terms and conditions.

**You must not:**
- Republish material from Trend-AI
- Sell, rent, or sub-license material from Trend-AI
- Reproduce, duplicate, or copy material from Trend-AI
- Redistribute content from Trend-AI

## 2. User Comments
Parts of this website offer an opportunity for users to post and exchange opinions and information in certain areas of the website. Trend-AI does not filter, edit, publish, or review Comments prior to their presence on the website. Comments do not reflect the views and opinions of Trend-AI, its agents, and/or affiliates.

## 3. Hyperlinking to our Content
The following organizations may link to our Website without prior written approval:
- Government agencies;
- Search engines;
- News organizations;
- Online directory distributors;

## 4. Content Liability
We shall not be held responsible for any content that appears on your Website. You agree to protect and defend us against all claims that are rising on your Website.

## 5. Disclaimer
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we exclude all representations, warranties, and conditions relating to our website and the use of this website. Nothing in this disclaimer will:
- limit or exclude our or your liability for death or personal injury;
- limit or exclude our or your liability for fraud or fraudulent misrepresentation;

## 6. Governing Law
These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which Trend-AI operates, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
